title: LanzaTech Awarded Significant Grant by UK Government to Propel Sustainable Aviation Fuel Production
content: LanzaTech Global, Inc., a leader in carbon management solutions, announced that it has received a grant of Â£6.4 million from the UK government's Advanced Fuels Fund (AFF), which is operated by the Department for Transport (DfT). The grant will accelerate the development of LanzaTechâ€™s innovative DRAGON 1 & 2 projects, each playing a crucial role in the production of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) in the UK. Project DRAGON stands for Decarbonizing and Reimagining Aviation for the Goal Of Netzero.
author: Analysts Account
